title: Animal Pens Expansion – Alex's Caves
description: This is addon for Animal Pens that enables Alex's Caves mobs.
body:
# Animal Pens Expansion - Alex's Caves

This mod is a compatibility addon that allows mobs from Alex's Caves to work with the pens from Animal Pens, making animal management easier and more consistent.

## Features

Animal Cage can pick up:
- GammaRoach - can be fed with spelunkie
- RayCat - can be fed with radgill
- Candicorn - can be fed with candy cane
- Gummy Bear - can be fed with sweet fish

Water Container Pickable:
- Trilocaris - can be picked up with water bucket
- Radgill - can be picked up with acid bucket
- Lanternfish - can be picked up with water bucket
- Sea Pig - can be picked up with water bucket
- Gossamer Worm - can be picked up with water bucket
- Tripodfish - can be picked up with water bucket
- Sweet Fish - can be picked up with soda bucket

Bird Catcher Pickable:
- Gloomoth - no extra interactions
- Notor - no extra interactions

Others:
- Primordial frog variant drops carmine froglight

## Sides:

Server side adds all interactions.

Client Side adds animations to mobs in Aviary and Aquarium.


## 🛠️ Requirements:

📌 **[Animal Pen](https://modrinth.com/mod/animalpens)** (Required).  
📖 **[Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)** (Required).
